code: module.exports = { actions: { async openSms(api, input, state) { const to = String(state.to || '').trim(); const body = String(state.body || '').trim(); if (!to) { return { status: 'Inserisci un numero destinatario.' }; } const result = await api.linking.sendSms(to, body); if (result && result.opened === false) { return { status: 'Impossibile aprire l\'app SMS.' }; } return { status: 'App SMS aperta.' }; } } };
